title: urtica peploides
intro: Urtica peploides, also known as New Zealand nettle, is a perennial plant in the nettle family Urticaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have various health benefits such as reducing pain, improving skin health, and supporting immune function. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to treat conditions such as arthritis, eczema, and digestive issues. Urtica peploides is also used in traditional medicine to support wound healing and reduce inflammation.
